name: Easy Elegant Miniature Chocolate Puffs
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Pkg sugar free chocolate-instant pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour and salt; set aside.
2. Combine water and margarine in a large saucepan; bring to boil.
3. Reduce heat to low and add flour mixture, stirring vigorously until the mixture forms a ball that leaves the sides of the pan.
4. Remove from heat and let cool for 3 minutes.
5. Add egg white (at room temperature) one at a time, beating after each addition. The dough will be smooth.
6. Pipe or spoon dough into 24 mounds, about 1 inch apart, onto a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
7. Bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes or until crisp and golden. Cool on racks.
8. Cut off tops of the puffs, set lids aside.
9. Pull out and discard soft dough inside each puff.
10. Chocolate Filling: Make pudding according to pie directions using skim milk. Chill at least 1 hour.
11. Pipe 1 teaspoon of Lite Cool Whip and 1 teaspoon of pudding mixture into each cream puff.
12. Place lid on top and arrange on a platter with mint garnish. Keep chilled until 5 minutes before serving.
